channel.title: self-belief on Mohammad Aziz
channel.description: Recent content in self-belief on Mohammad Aziz

item.title: Keep Working On Wrong Ideas
item.description: It’s important to ask what you should be working on. But since most side projects are abandoned — is that even the right question to start with? If you’re not pushing your work beyond the finish line, how do you know whether it’s good or bad? The excitement fades away, and you start questioning — is this a wrong idea? I want to tell you — you should keep working on your wrong ideas.
